title: Enhancing access to professional sign language interpretation – Call for Concepts - Canada.ca
content:
## Enhancing access to professional sign language interpretation – Call for concepts

## Enhancing Access to Professional Sign Language Interpretation – Call for Concepts
Up to $2,000,000 per concept
This call ran between August 11, 2023, and September 15, 2023, at 3:00 p.m., Eastern Daylight Time (EDT) Closed
Eligible not-for-profit and for-profit organizations
What this program offers:
Funding projects that will increase access to American Sign Language (ASL) and to langue des signes québécoise (LSQ) interpretation over time.

## ASL version of this page (with audio)

## Information sessions
Two information sessions were held on:
- August 22, 2023, at 1:00 p.m. EDT (French)
- August 23, 2023, at 1:00 p.m. EDT (English)
Enquiries will be answered between August 11, 2023, and September 13, 2023, at 3:00 p.m. EDT
If you need access to documents in another format, for example:
- if you have other needs
Contact us by August 25, 2023, at 3:00 p.m. EDT.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
